tempo.notConstant: Tempo is not constant — the grid is advisory
tempo.errTooShort: Segment too short for tempo detection (needs ~5 s)

midiExtract.done: MIDI extracted — new vocal track created
midiExtract.stale: Segment changed during extraction — result dropped
midiExtract.errNotInstalled: GAME engine not installed — download it under Resource Manager · Tool Models

rangeTest.busy: A render is in flight — try the range test later
rangeTest.noUsable: Range test found no usable zone — the model may be undertrained

clipboard.typeMismatch: Clipboard content doesn't match the target track type

export.clipWarn: Peak exceeded 0 dB — fixed-point/lossy output clipped (same as playback). Lower the faders and re-export for clean headroom
export.errVocals: A vocal track failed to render — export aborted (see the error toasts)
export.errLoading: Audio sources are still loading — try again shortly
export.errMissing: A source audio file is missing — cannot export
export.errEmpty: The project has no audio content to export
export.errUnrendered: The vocal tracks haven't been rendered to audio yet (check that a singer is assigned) — nothing to export
export.errTooLong: The project exceeds the 60-minute export limit
export.errScoreEmpty: The selected tracks have no notes to export
export.errScoreWrite: Failed to write the score file
export.ustZipNote: Multiple tracks are packed into a zip (one .ust per track)

import.pitchDropped: One track's pitch tuning exceeded the import limit and was imported untuned (notes are intact)

error.unsupported: Unsupported file format (only ustx / ust / mid / midi)
error.smpte: SMPTE-timecode MIDI is not supported (quarter-note tick MIDI only)

project.discardBody: The current project has unsaved changes. Discard them?
project.saveMissing: Saved, but some referenced audio files were missing on disk (skipped)
project.closeBody: Save changes to the current project before closing?
project.recoverBody: UtaiSynthesizer didn't close normally last time. Recover your unsaved work?

close.title: Close UtaiSynthesizer
close.body: Minimize to the tray, or quit UtaiSynthesizer?
close.busyIntro: These tasks are still running — quitting now will lose their progress:

tracks.empty: Drop audio files or add a new track
tracks.playOriginal: Play the original audio (sub-lanes leave the output)
tracks.noVoices: No singer models available — import one in the Resource Manager first
tracks.oovWarning: Unrecognized lyrics (OOV) — check the lyric or the note/track language

training.title: Model Training
training.dataHint: Import clean vocal recordings. If separation/denoising is needed, process them on the track area first, export, then import here.
training.multiSpeakerHint: One singer by default. Click "+ Add singer" to add more — the trained model can then blend these voices by ratio in the voice-conversion node.
training.backendDiffDesc: SoVITS companion model · same name as the main model reuses its preprocessing caches · 44.1k
training.backendVocoderDesc: Fine-tune a singer's own NSF-HiFiGAN · better SoVITS diffusion/enhancer quality · shared by all their models
training.vocScopeValue: SoVITS (4.0/4.1) shallow diffusion & enhancer · 44.1kHz / hop 512 / 128 mel · RVC has no external vocoder interface
training.vocTotalStepsTip: Official guidance: ~2000 steps finish a small-dataset fine-tune
training.vocLicenseNote: Base model = the openvpi community vocoder 2024.02 (downloaded once by you; the missing-file error shows the URL); its weights are CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 and fine-tuned results inherit that license (non-commercial).
training.vocFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz / hop 512 / 128 mel (the OpenVPI standard format) · f0 = parselmouth · fp32 training · base = community vocoder 2024.02
training.vocCropTip: Mel frames of the random training window: 32 = 16GB preset, 48 = 24GB preset
training.vocFreezeMpd: Freeze the MPD discriminator (official tip for short fine-tunes)
training.vocFreezeMpdTip: Freezes the multi-period discriminator, training only the generator and MSD — the official README suggests it may help short fine-tunes
training.nameExists: A model with this name already exists
training.fixedNote: Fixed: f0 = RMVPE · features = ContentVec · retrieval index = auto-built
training.sovitsFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz · f0 = RMVPE · features = ContentVec · retrieval/cluster assets built at preprocessing
training.cacheAllData: Cache dataset in RAM (recommended for diffusion)
training.diffFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz · mel = NSF-HiFiGAN recipe · features/pitch share the same-named main model's caches · keyshift augmentation on · loudnorm/volume embedding follow the main workspace
training.diffNoBase40: No public diffusion base model exists for 4.0 (vec256) — training starts from scratch; consider more total steps
training.diffNoModels: No SoVITS model installed yet — the shallow-diffusion companion attaches to an installed model; train or import the main model first
training.diffWorkspaceReuse: Same-named SoVITS training workspace found — its preprocessing caches will be reused (use the same dataset as the main model)
training.diffWorkspaceProgress: Same-named workspace already has {{steps}} diffusion steps — you can resume or retrain when starting
training.diffWorkspaceForeign: A same-named workspace belongs to another backend ({{family}}) — please pick a different model name
training.diffConfirmResumeBody: "{{name}}" already has {{steps}} trained diffusion steps. Resume continues from there; retrain clears ONLY the diffusion progress (main-model checkpoints and preprocessing caches are kept).
training.diffConfirmReuseBody: The preprocessing caches of workspace "{{name}}" will be reused (use the same dataset as the main model). Retrain = clear this workspace's diffusion progress and start over.
training.diffRetrainFullWipeNote: Note: this workspace has no main-model checkpoints — retraining wipes the ENTIRE workspace (preprocessing caches included).
training.retrainWipesDiff: Note: this workspace also holds shallow-diffusion training progress ({{steps}} steps) — retraining will wipe it too.
training.noAttachTarget: No installed SoVITS model to attach to (feature dims must match) — import the main model first, then attach here
training.volEmbedding: Volume embedding (inference loudness follows the input)
training.loudnorm: Loudness normalize (peak to 0dB — upstream default, lossy)
training.kmeansOpt: Train kmeans cluster centers instead of retrieval
training.allInMem: Keep dataset in RAM (speeds up small datasets)
training.saveWeights: Export a small model at each save
training.keepLatest: Keep only the latest big checkpoint (saves disk)
training.noGpuCpuNote: No trainable GPU detected — this run will train on CPU (very slow)
training.clearResultTip: Clears only the last run's results and curve shown on this page; the workspace and checkpoints are kept, resuming is unaffected
training.clearResultConfirmBody: Clear this page's training results and curve? Workspace and checkpoint files are kept and resuming is unaffected, but this list (with each checkpoint's audition/import/attach buttons) will no longer be shown, and the audition cache will be deleted.
training.auditionSpeakerTip: Which speaker of the multi-speaker model to audition; does not affect the kept checkpoints (a checkpoint always contains every speaker)
training.auditionNeedHost: Select an attach target model first
training.importSelectedBody: The selected checkpoints will be imported with these names (existing same-name models are replaced; use the per-row Import button to customize a name):
training.envMissingBody:
Training needs the embedded Python runtime (a GPU pack matching your card, or the universal CPU pack).
Download it in Settings → Training Runtime, then start training.
training.assetsMissingBody: This run needs the following files, which are not installed yet:
training.forceStopConfirmBody: Force termination does not save current progress (the last checkpoint is kept). Terminate?
training.augCopiesTip: Experimental: generates N PSOLA pitch-shifted copies (within ±3 semitones) per slice to expand the dataset (time-domain, formant-preserving — timbre is unchanged). A per-slice quality gate drops bad copies automatically (details in the workspace's aug_gate_report.json); augmented copies never enter the validation set or retrieval assets. Note: the dataset grows to about (1+N)×, so steps per epoch grow accordingly — budget training by total steps, not epochs. 0 = off
training.augFollowWorkspace: Copy count follows the main training's setting (not adjustable here)
training.diffPoolHint: Shallow diffusion shares one data pool with the main training: start without importing to use the main training's existing data, or import here to REPLACE the shared pool with new data (affects this and future diffusion runs only — the already-trained main model is unaffected)
training.errorHint: See train.log in the training workspace for details
training.versionMismatchBody: The training workspace of "{{name}}" is {{old}} but {{new}} is selected — resuming across versions is impossible. Retrain wipes the workspace and starts over as {{new}}.
training.modelVersionMismatchBody: A model named "{{name}}" ({{old}}) already exists and there is no resumable workspace. {{new}} is selected — training starts from scratch; importing under the same name afterwards replaces the existing model.
training.noWorkspaceBody: A model named "{{name}}" already exists but there is no resumable training workspace — training starts from scratch; importing under the same name afterwards replaces the existing model.
training.confirmExistBody: "{{name}}" already exists. Resume continues from the last checkpoint; Retrain wipes the workspace and starts over.
training.dropHint: Drop here to add as training data
training.ckptRangeTip: Auto range-test result (comfort zone) — auditions transpose the high-skewed clip into this zone and back

workflow.title: Workflow Editor
workflow.errTransposeInput: Transpose node: input audio not found (upstream node produced no file?)
workflow.depositFailed: Failed to deposit output to track
workflow.noOutputs: Run finished but produced no track output — check the Output node is connected to a rendered upstream
workflow.runBusy: A render is already in progress — stop it or wait for it to finish
workflow.drainQueued: A render is already queued behind the one still stopping — this click was ignored
workflow.drainWaiting: The previous render is stopping — this one will start automatically when it finishes
workflow.drainTimeout: Timed out waiting for the previous render to stop — check the log
workflow.separationBusy: A separation job is already running — wait for it to finish or stop it first
workflow.errSeparationNotConverted: This model has not been converted to ONNX (missing .onnx or its .json) — convert it in the model manager first

common.autoCudaFallback: This GPU couldn't run CUDA — automatically switched to CPU to keep rendering (slower). For GPU acceleration, switch to the DirectML runtime in Settings and restart.
common.devicePreferenceDemoted: The inference device you had selected is no longer usable on this machine (the GPU or the runtime package changed) — it has been reset to Automatic. You can pick again in Settings → Inference device.
common.busyRetry: The app is busy — try again shortly

update.title: Update Available
update.restartNote: The update downloads and installs automatically; the app will close and restart. Unsaved changes are offered for recovery after the restart.
update.installing: Installing — the app will restart shortly…
update.checkFailedHint: Likely a network issue. Retry in Settings → Version & Updates, where you can also turn off checking on startup.
update.quitBlocked: An update is downloading/installing — the app restarts automatically when done; cancel the update first if you need to quit

startup.dataDirIssue: Data folder problem: the configured folder was missing and has been handled — see Settings → Storage for details
startup.compBody: The following required components are not installed yet:
startup.compRuntime: Converter runtime (required to import / convert voice models; ships a CPU PyTorch)
startup.compAux: Core inference models (required for vocal rendering / voice conversion / pitch extraction, ~1.4GB)
startup.compHint: Download them now with one click (progress shows in the Settings panel), or later under Settings → Model Assets / Training Runtime.
startup.integrityBody: The following files that ship with the program are missing or damaged (an interrupted update, disk trouble, or an antivirus false positive can cause this):
startup.integrityOrt: The inference engine (onnxruntime) could not be loaded from the program folder — running on a system fallback with no performance/compatibility guarantees
startup.integrityHint: These files can't be re-downloaded individually in-app; re-running the installer repairs them (installing over the top keeps your models and data). Latest installer: Settings → Check for updates, or the release page.
startup.integrityMute: Don't remind me for this version

missingModels.title: Missing / unconverted models
missingModels.body: This run involves the following issues — fix each one, then run again:
missingModels.downloadStarted: Download started — progress in Settings → Model Assets
missingModels.autotunePack: Auto pitch tuning model pack (~6 MB)
missingModels.hint: Conversions run one at a time; once everything is done, click Run / Render again.

sidebar.formantTip: Track-wide formant shift (semitones), added on top of the bottom formant lane. Higher = brighter/younger, lower = darker/fuller; 0 = no change.
sidebar.breathTokenTip: Notes with this lyric render as a breath; set it to any word you like. AP/ap are always breath.
sidebar.trackLangTip: Lyrics on this track convert to phonemes in this language; individual notes can override it below.
sidebar.noteLangTip: Applies only to the selected notes; "Follow track" uses the track default above.
sidebar.rangeExtendTip: Out-of-comfort phrases render transposed into the singer's comfort zone, then shift back in the audio domain (needs a range record from the Resource Manager; in-range renders are untouched)
sidebar.autotuneFollowTip: Untuned notes are tuned automatically (manual parameters and drawn pitch lines are never touched)
sidebar.autotuneRigidTip: Flattens the auto-tuned vibrato wobble: +100% = fully rigid, −100% = maximum wobble
sidebar.autotuneExprTip: Scales the whole auto-tune: glide overshoot, edge scoops and vibrato together
sidebar.autotuneTakeTip: Switch the delivery (vibrato phase): the same number is always the same take, dial back anytime. 0 = baseline
sidebar.autotunePaused: Auto follow paused (tuning model not ready) — it resumes automatically once the model is downloaded

render.busy: A render is already in progress
render.spkMixDiffusion: Multi-speaker blend is incompatible with diffusion: the diffusion stage ignores the blend (pulls the timbre toward a single speaker). Turn off diffusion, or use a single speaker
render.oov: Lyric "{{lyric}}" cannot be mapped to phonemes (OOV) — check the lyric or the note/track language
render.phoneMissing: Internal error: phoneme "{{phone}}" is not in the ScoreToCV vocabulary
render.dictMissing: Pronunciation dictionary missing ({{file}}) — check that data/dictionaries is intact
render.moreFailures: More vocal tracks failed to render (repeats omitted)

backend.AUDIO_TOO_SHORT_HIGHPASS: Audio too short for high-pass filtering
backend.AUDITION_BAD_TYPE: Audition does not support this model type
backend.AUDITION_CLIP_MISSING: The audition clip is missing (it should ship with the app)
backend.AUDITION_CONFIG_NO_SAMPLE_RATE: The candidate config lacks sample_rate — the conversion output is corrupt; clear results and audition again
backend.AUDITION_CONFIG_PARSE_FAILED: Failed to parse the candidate config — clear results and audition again
backend.AUDITION_CONFIG_READ_FAILED: Failed to read the candidate config — the conversion cache is incomplete; clear results and audition again
backend.AUDITION_DIR_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create the audition directory
backend.AUDITION_HOST_MODEL_MISSING: SoVITS model not found — select a host model first
backend.AUDITION_RENDER_BUSY: A voice render is in progress — wait for it to finish before auditioning
backend.AUDITION_TRAINING_ACTIVE: Training is running — candidate audition unavailable, retry later
backend.AUDITION_VOCODER_NONSTANDARD: The vocoder format is not the standard format (44100/512/128) — cannot audition
backend.AUDITION_WAV_WRITE_FAILED: Failed to write the audition audio
backend.AUTOTUNE_NO_OUTPUT: The auto-tune model produced no output — the model file may be corrupt, please re-download
backend.AUTOTUNE_SHAPE: Unexpected auto-tune model output shape — the model file may be corrupt, please re-download
backend.AUTOTUNE_TOO_MANY_NOTES: Auto-tune failed: note count exceeds the limit
backend.AUTOTUNE_UNSORTED: Auto-tune failed: notes out of order
backend.AUTO_F0_FILE_MISSING: The auto-pitch predictor file is missing — re-import the model
backend.AUTO_F0_FRAMES_MISMATCH: Automatic pitch prediction frame count mismatch
backend.AUTO_F0_NOT_EXPORTED: The model was exported without an auto-pitch predictor (it may lack f0_decoder weights, or was exported by an old converter — re-import the .pth to generate one)
backend.AUTO_F0_NO_OUTPUT: The automatic pitch predictor returned no output
backend.AUTO_F0_NO_F0D_OUTPUT: The automatic pitch predictor lacks the f0d_cond output (outdated model export — re-import the model)
backend.AUTO_F0_F0D_SHAPE: The automatic pitch predictor's f0d_cond output has an unexpected shape
backend.AUX_FILE_MISSING: Auxiliary file missing — place it into the indicated directory
backend.AUX_VOCODER_MEL_MISSING: NSF-HiFiGAN mel filterbank missing — place it into the indicated directory
backend.CONTENTVEC_INPUT_TOO_SHORT: Audio chunk too short to extract content features
backend.CONTENTVEC_NO_OUTPUT: The ContentVec model returned no output
backend.CONTENTVEC_RESHAPE_FAILED: Failed to reshape the ContentVec output
backend.DELETE_WHILE_BUSY: A task is running — wait for it to finish (or stop it) before deleting.
backend.DELETE_WHILE_ENVTEST: An environment self-test is running — wait for it to finish before deleting.
backend.DELETE_WHILE_INSTALLING: A runtime pack is downloading/installing — wait for it to finish or cancel it before deleting.
backend.DIFFUSION_DENOISER_NO_OUTPUT: The diffusion denoiser returned no output
backend.DIFFUSION_DIM_MISMATCH: The diffusion model's feature dimension doesn't match the main model — they can't be used together
backend.DIFFUSION_ENCODER_NO_OUTPUT: The diffusion condition encoder returned no output
backend.DIFFUSION_FILE_MISSING: A diffusion model file is missing — re-attach the diffusion model
backend.DIFFUSION_GEOMETRY_MISMATCH: Diffusion model / main model geometry mismatch
backend.DIFFUSION_KSTEP_EXCEEDS_MAX: Shallow-diffusion k_step exceeds this diffusion model's k_step_max
backend.DIFFUSION_NOT_ATTACHED: The model has no diffusion attachment — attach a diffusion .pt+.yaml at import to enable shallow diffusion
backend.DIFFUSION_REPLACE_FAILED: Failed to replace the diffusion attachment
backend.DIFFUSION_SCHEDULE_UNSUPPORTED: The diffusion model's schedule is unsupported — re-import with the current converter
backend.DIFFUSION_SHALLOW_ONLY: This diffusion model only supports shallow diffusion and cannot run standalone
backend.DIFFUSION_SIDECAR_FIELD_MISSING: The diffusion attachment config is missing a field (diffusion.json corrupt or outdated) — re-attach the diffusion model
backend.DIFFUSION_SPEAKER_OUT_OF_RANGE: Speaker id exceeds the diffusion model's n_spk
backend.DIFFUSION_SPEEDUP_TOO_FEW_STEPS: k_step / speedup leaves too few steps — dpm/unipc samplers need at least 2; lower the speedup
backend.DIFFUSION_SWAP_FAILED: Failed to move out the old diffusion attachment
backend.DIFFUSION_T_OUT_OF_RANGE: Diffusion step count is out of the schedule range
backend.DIFF_VERSION_MISMATCH: The diffusion model must match the workspace's main model version — switch back to the matching version and train again
backend.DIFF_WIPE_FAILED: Failed to clear the diffusion training progress
backend.DOWNLOAD_OVERSIZE: Download exceeded the expected size (cache cleared)
backend.DOWNLOAD_RANGE_INVALID: Resume range invalid (HTTP 416) — cache cleared, please retry
backend.DOWNLOAD_SHA256_MISMATCH: sha256 verification failed — the corrupted download cache was deleted, please retry
backend.DOWNLOAD_STALLED: Download stalled (no data received for too long)
backend.ENVTEST_BUSY: An environment self-test is already running
backend.ENVTEST_CANCELLED: Self-test cancelled (the pack is installed — you can run it manually from the list later)
backend.ENVTEST_CRASHED: The self-test exited abnormally without producing a report
backend.ENVTEST_FAILED: Self-test failed (see envtest.json in the pack / the Settings panel for details)
backend.ENVTEST_OP_FALLBACK_COLD: Some operators ran on the CPU instead of the GPU (not hot ones — limited impact)
backend.ENVTEST_OP_FALLBACK_HOT: Hot operators (conv/STFT/FFT) fell back to the CPU — training will be much slower, especially the vocoder. Usually an incomplete driver or architecture support
backend.ENVTEST_PACKAGES_BROKEN: The runtime pack has missing or broken Python packages — delete the pack and download it again
backend.ENVTEST_TORCH_NO_CUDA: PyTorch cannot use CUDA — usually a graphics driver that is too old or does not match this pack; update the NVIDIA driver and run the self-test again
backend.ENVTEST_REPORT_CLEAR_FAILED: Could not clear the old self-test report
backend.ENVTEST_REPORT_CONTRADICTION: The self-test report contradicts the process exit code — treated as a failure
backend.ENVTEST_SCRIPT_MISSING: Self-test script not found — is the app directory incomplete?
backend.ENVTEST_TIMEOUT: Self-test timed out and was terminated — check whether antivirus is blocking the embedded python.exe
backend.ENVTEST_WAIT_FAILED: Failed to wait on the self-test process
backend.EXPORT_BAD_PCM: Export data transfer corrupted — please retry the export
backend.EXPORT_FFMPEG_MISSING: ffmpeg not found — compressed formats unavailable (WAV still works)
backend.EXPORT_NO_PCM: Export data was lost — please retry the export
backend.EXPORT_WRITE_FAIL: Failed to write the export file
backend.FEATURES_DIM_UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported content-feature dimension (only 256 / 768) — check the model config's features_dim / speech_encoder
backend.FFMPEG_MISSING: ffmpeg.exe not found (required for training preprocessing)
backend.INDEX_LOAD_FAILED: Failed to load the retrieval index
backend.INFERENCE_LOW_MEMORY: System memory is too low — GPU inference was stopped to avoid a crash. Close other memory-heavy applications and retry, switch the inference device to CPU in Settings, or use fewer separation nodes in the workflow.
backend.INSTALL_BUSY: A runtime pack is already downloading/installing — wait for it to finish or cancel it first.
backend.INSTALL_COMMIT_WRITE_FAILED: Runtime pack install could not finish: writing the install marker file failed
backend.INSTALL_DISK_FULL: Not enough disk space — stopped before writing more data (anything already downloaded is kept and resumable). Free up space on the target drive (or migrate the data directory to a larger drive first) and retry
backend.INTERNAL_ENHANCER_NO_VOCODER: Internal error: the enhancer is enabled but no vocoder is loaded
backend.INTERNAL_NO_OUTPUT_PATH: Internal error: neither a VITS output nor a diffusion config
backend.INTERNAL_UNIPC_SINGULAR: Internal error: the unipc Vandermonde matrix is singular
backend.LOCAL_FILE_BAD_DIR: Could not resolve the selected file's directory
backend.LOCAL_FILE_BAD_NAME: Could not resolve the selected file name
backend.LOCAL_FILE_BAD_TYPE: Select a .tar.zst runtime pack (or its .part01 volume)
backend.LOCAL_PARTS_GAP: Parts are not contiguous (a volume is missing)
backend.MANIFEST_BAD_ID: The manifest id contains illegal characters
backend.MANIFEST_BAD_PART_NAME: A manifest part name contains illegal characters
backend.MIGRATE_DISK_FULL: Not enough free space on the target drive — the migration did not start; nothing was changed and your data is still in the original location. Free up space and retry
backend.MIGRATE_RESTART_REQUIRED: A migration already completed this session — restart the app before starting another one
backend.MIGRATE_VERIFY_FAILED: Post-migration integrity check failed — nothing was changed, your data is still in the original location. Check the target drive's free space and retry
backend.MODEL_HOP_SIZE_ZERO: The model config's hop_size is 0 — cannot run inference
backend.MODEL_LEGACY_EXPORT: The model is a legacy export (missing the new input signature) — delete it and re-import to upgrade
backend.MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Model not found — import it in the resource manager first
backend.MODEL_NOT_LOADED: The model is not loaded yet
backend.MSST_DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete the separation model file
backend.PACK_DELETE_FAILED: Delete failed (could not remove the marker file). If a conversion/self-test just ran, wait a few seconds and retry.
backend.PACK_FORMAT_INVALID: Invalid pack format: the first entry must be pack.json (rebuild with the latest build_pack.py)
backend.PACK_JSON_BAD_ID: The id in pack.json contains illegal characters
backend.PACK_NO_DOWNLOAD_SOURCE: This runtime pack has no published download source yet — use "Install from local file".
backend.PACK_NO_PYTHON: python/python.exe missing from the pack (not a valid runtime pack)
backend.PROBE_CONNECT_FAILED: Could not establish a connection (DNS / network / blocked)
backend.PROBE_CONNECT_TIMEOUT: Connection timed out (possible network interference or unreachable source)
backend.PROBE_HTTP_ERROR: The source has no test file or refused access
backend.PROBE_TIMEOUT: Connection/response timed out (possible network interference or unreachable source)
backend.RENAME_RETRY_EXHAUSTED: Rename kept being denied after multiple retries — usually antivirus/search indexing is scanning the new files: wait a moment and retry, or add the data folder to the antivirus exclusion list.
backend.RESUME_KSTEP_MISMATCH: Diffusion depth (k_step_max) differs from the existing diffusion progress — resume must keep it, or retrain (clears diffusion progress only)
backend.RESUME_PARAMS_MISMATCH: Resume parameters differ from the original workspace — resume must keep the original version and sample rate, or retrain
backend.RESUME_SPEAKER_COUNT_MISMATCH: Singer count differs from the original workspace — co-training must keep it, or retrain
backend.RESUME_SPEAKER_SET_MISMATCH: Singer set or order differs from the original workspace — co-training must keep the same singers and order, or retrain
backend.RESUME_TARGET_REACHED_DIFF: The diffusion model has already reached the target total steps — increase total steps to resume, or retrain
backend.RESUME_TARGET_REACHED_VOCODER: The vocoder has already reached the target total steps — increase total steps to resume, or retrain
backend.RESUME_VOL_EMBEDDING_MISMATCH: Resume parameter mismatch (loudness embedding) — this switch determines the model architecture; resume must keep it, or retrain
backend.RMVPE_MEL_SHAPE: rmvpe_mel_filters.npy has an unexpected shape — please re-export or re-download it
backend.RMVPE_NO_OUTPUT: The RMVPE model returned no output
backend.RUNTIME_DRIVER_TOO_OLD: The NVIDIA driver is too old for the NVIDIA runtime (CUDA 13 requires driver 580 or newer). Update the driver at nvidia.com and retry; until then the CPU runtime works
backend.RUNTIME_PACK_REQUIRED: Model conversion needs a Python runtime, but no runtime pack is installed. Install the "CPU runtime" pack (about 0.4 GB download) in Settings → Training Runtime, or install the pack matching your GPU, then retry.
backend.RUNTIME_PATH_NON_ASCII: The runtime install path contains non-ASCII characters. Embedded Python + torch fail to load DLLs under paths with Chinese/Japanese characters — migrate the data folder to an ASCII-only path (e.g. D:\UtaiData) in Settings → Storage first, then retry.
backend.RVC_CHUNK_TOO_SHORT: Audio chunk too short: the model output cannot cover the front/back padding trim
backend.RVC_MIN_FRAMES: Audio chunk too short: frame count is below the model's minimum
backend.RVC_NO_OUTPUT: The RVC model returned no output
backend.RVC_SR_NOT_100FPS: The model sample rate is not a multiple of 100, so it cannot be aligned to the 100 fps frame grid
backend.SCORE2CV_DIM_UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported vocal-rendering content dimension (only 256 / 768) — check the selected singer model's features_dim
backend.SCORE2CV_NO_OUTPUT: The ScoreToCV model returned no output
backend.SCORE2SVC_ZERO_FRAMES: Target frame count is 0 (the score is too short)
backend.SHARED_POOL_REUSED: Reusing the shared slice pool (no re-import)
backend.SOVITS_NO_OUTPUT: The SoVITS model returned no output
backend.TAR_READ_FAILED: Failed to read the tar archive
backend.TRAINING_ACTIVE: Training is running — try again later
backend.TRAINING_ALREADY_RUNNING: A training run is already in progress
backend.TRAINING_ASSET_MISSING: A required training file is missing — place the file at the indicated path
backend.TRAINING_AUG_COPIES_MAX: Augmentation copies can be at most 3
backend.TRAINING_BACKEND_UNSUPPORTED: This training backend is not implemented (supported: RVC / SoVITS / shallow diffusion / vocoder finetune)
backend.TRAINING_BAD_VOCODER_FORMAT: Invalid vocoder format (only classic NSF-HiFiGAN is supported)
backend.TRAINING_CROP_FRAMES_ZERO: Crop frame count must be greater than 0
backend.TRAINING_GPU_UNAVAILABLE: Training could not access the selected GPU — the run was aborted. Check the GPU driver and try again; if this machine's GPU does not support accelerated training, enable "Force CPU training" in the parameters step to proceed
backend.TRAINING_RUNTIME_CPU_ONLY: A GPU was detected, but only the CPU training runtime pack is installed — the run was aborted instead of silently training on CPU. Install the runtime pack matching your GPU in Settings → Training Runtime; if you really mean to train on CPU, enable "Force CPU training" in the parameters step to proceed
backend.TRAINING_IMPORT_COPY_FAILED: Failed to import a data file
backend.TRAINING_INTERNAL_ASSET_BRANCH: Training backend is missing its asset-resolution branch (internal error)
backend.TRAINING_KILL_FAILED: Failed to kill the training process
backend.TRAINING_MULTI_BACKEND: Multi-singer co-training currently supports only SoVITS and RVC
backend.TRAINING_NAME_EMPTY: Model name must not be empty
backend.TRAINING_NO_SHARED_POOL: This model has no reusable main-training workspace data — import training data first
backend.TRAINING_PROCESS_CRASHED: The training process exited abnormally. Common causes: out of VRAM/RAM (OOM), killed by antivirus, or a corrupted training environment. See train.log in the training workspace; recent output is shown in the status panel.
backend.TRAINING_PYTHON_SPAWN_FAILED: Failed to start the training Python (training environment not set up?)
backend.TRAINING_SAVE_INTERVAL_ZERO: Save interval must be greater than 0
backend.TRAINING_SPEAKER_LIMIT: RVC multi-singer co-training supports at most 109 singers
backend.TRAINING_SPEAKER_NAME_DUP: Duplicate singer name (multi-singer co-training requires unique names)
backend.TRAINING_SPEAKER_NAME_EMPTY: Every singer must have a name
backend.TRAINING_SPEAKER_NO_DATA: This singer has no data files
backend.TRAINING_SR_FIXED_44K: This training is fixed at a 44.1 kHz sample rate
backend.TRAINING_THREAD_SPAWN_FAILED: Failed to spawn the training thread
backend.TRAINING_TOTAL_STEPS_ZERO: Total steps must be greater than 0
backend.ASSET_DL_BUSY: A model-asset download is already running — wait for it to finish
backend.ASSET_DELETE_FAILED: Could not delete the asset pack's files (something may be holding them — close Explorer/antivirus scans and retry)
backend.CUDA_DELETE_FAILED: Could not delete the CUDA runtime (the folder may be in use — close Explorer/antivirus scans and retry)
backend.CUDA_DELETE_IN_USE: This session is using the CUDA runtime, so it can't be deleted. Set Settings → Inference device to DirectML or CPU, restart the app, then delete it.
backend.CUDA_DOWNLOAD_BUSY: The CUDA runtime download is already running — wait for it to finish
backend.CUDA_GPU_REQUIRED: No NVIDIA GPU detected — CUDA is NVIDIA-only. Use the default DirectML (works on any GPU)
backend.CUDA_UNSUPPORTED_GPU: This GPU can't run the CUDA build (its compute capability is outside the supported range) — use DirectML instead (works on any GPU); switch the inference device to Auto or DirectML in Settings.
backend.DML_NEEDS_RESTART: The inference device is set to DirectML, but this session loaded the CUDA runtime — restart the app and try again (the runtime is chosen at startup).
backend.DOWNLOAD_HTML_RESPONSE: The download source returned a web page instead of the file (the mirror proxy is likely dead) — pick another GitHub mirror in Settings → Download Source
backend.CUDA_LOCAL_UNRECOGNIZED: Unrecognized file — pick only the official wheel / nupkg files listed below
backend.CUDA_LOCAL_BAD_FILE: File content not as expected (the official win_amd64 wheel is required)
backend.CONVERT_BUSY: A model conversion is already running — wait for it to finish and try again
backend.CONVERT_RENDER_BUSY: A render is in progress — start the conversion after it finishes
backend.CONVERT_LOW_MEMORY: Not enough memory to convert this model — the export ran out of memory. Close other memory-heavy applications and try again, or convert on a machine with more RAM.
backend.MSST_ARCH_UNKNOWN: Cannot detect the model architecture from the filename
backend.RENDER_WRITE_FAILED: Failed to write the rendered audio to disk
backend.UPDATE_CHECK_FAILED: Update check failed (network or update source unreachable)
backend.UPDATE_INSTALL_FAILED: Failed to launch the update installer
backend.UPDATE_NO_PENDING: No pending update (check for updates first)
backend.VOCAL_F0_FRAMES_MISMATCH: f0 frame count doesn't match the notes' total frames (render aborted to avoid pitch misalignment)
backend.VOCAL_SEGMENT_TOO_LONG: The vocal segment is too long — split it into multiple segments to render
backend.VOCODER_CONFIG_FIELD_MISSING: The vocoder config is missing a field — the mel format cannot be verified; re-import it
backend.VOCODER_CONFIG_MISSING: The vocoder's config file is missing — re-import it in the resource manager
backend.VOCODER_FILTER_SHAPE_MISMATCH: Vocoder filterbank shape doesn't match the config's num_mels
backend.VOCODER_GEOMETRY_MISMATCH: Vocoder/model geometry mismatch — shallow diffusion / the enhancer only support 44.1kHz/512 SoVITS models
backend.VOCODER_JSON_PARSE_FAILED: Failed to parse the vocoder .json config
backend.VOCODER_JSON_REQUIRED: Vocoder .onnx import requires a companion .json config (same name, same directory) — a vocoder without mel-spectrogram parameters is unusable
backend.VOCODER_MEL_FORMAT_MISMATCH: The vocoder's mel format doesn't match the model — a vocoder can only be used with models of the same mel format
backend.VOCODER_MEL_MISSING: The vocoder's mel filterbank file is missing — re-import the vocoder in the resource manager
backend.VOCODER_NOT_FOUND: Vocoder missing or deleted — re-select a vocoder in the node (or switch back to the default vocoder)
backend.VOCODER_NO_OUTPUT: The NSF-HiFiGAN vocoder returned no output
backend.VOCODER_PCNSF_UNSUPPORTED: PC-NSF (mini_nsf) vocoders are not supported yet — only classic NSF-HiFiGAN
backend.WARN_AUTO_F0_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy the automatic pitch predictor — auto-f0 unavailable
backend.WARN_AUTO_F0_MISSING: The automatic pitch predictor file is missing — auto-f0 disabled for this model (re-import the .pth to restore)
backend.WARN_CLUSTER_CONVERT_FAILED: Cluster/retrieval model conversion failed — model imported, cluster enhancement unavailable
backend.WARN_CLUSTER_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy the cluster asset
backend.WARN_CLUSTER_DIR_FAILED: Failed to create the cluster asset directory
backend.WARN_CLUSTER_EMPTY_OUTPUT: Cluster model conversion produced no .npy — model imported, cluster/retrieval unavailable
backend.WARN_CLUSTER_MULTI_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy a multi-speaker retrieval asset
backend.WARN_DIFFUSION_CONVERT_FAILED: Diffusion model conversion failed — model imported, shallow diffusion unavailable
backend.WARN_DIFFUSION_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy the diffusion attachment — shallow diffusion unavailable
backend.WARN_DIFFUSION_DIM_MISMATCH: The diffusion model's feature dim differs from the main model — they cannot work together; the attachment was removed
backend.WARN_INDEX_CONVERT_FAILED: Index file conversion failed — model imported, but retrieval enhancement unavailable
backend.WARN_INDEX_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy the index file
backend.WARN_SIDECAR_REGENERATED: The model's .json config could not be parsed — regenerated with defaults
backend.WARN_SIDECAR_SYNTHESIZED: No companion .json config found — generated with defaults; if they don't match the model's real parameters, re-import with the config file
backend.WORKSPACE_BACKEND_MISMATCH: A same-named training workspace belongs to another backend — use a different model name, or retrain to wipe it (shallow diffusion requires a SoVITS workspace)
backend.WORKSPACE_DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete the training workspace (the folder may be in use — close Explorer/antivirus scans and retry)
backend.WORKSPACE_MANIFEST_MISSING: The same-named training workspace lacks run_manifest.json (inconsistent state) — retrain (wipes the workspace) or use a different model name
backend.WORKSPACE_WIPE_FAILED: Failed to wipe the old training workspace
backend.XPU_NO_DEVICE: No usable Intel XPU GPU was found: torch-XPU supports only the Arc family (Arc A/B discrete cards, the Core Ultra "Arc Graphics" iGPU, Data Center GPU Max) — not Iris Xe / UHD / HD Graphics. Inference is unaffected (the default DirectML runs on any GPU); GPU acceleration for training and model conversion needs Arc or newer. If you do have an Arc card, install the latest Intel graphics driver and run the self-test again
backend.ZSTD_INIT_FAILED: Failed to initialize the zstd decoder
